content.text:
Introduction to Algebra

Algebra is a branch of mathematics that uses symbols and letters to represent numbers and quantities in formulas and equations.

What You'll Learn:

  • Understanding variables and constants
  • Basic algebraic expressions
  • Solving simple equations
  • Real-world applications of algebra

Key Concepts:

  • Variables - Letters that represent unknown values
  • Constants - Fixed numerical values
  • Expressions - Combinations of variables and constants
  • Equations - Mathematical statements with equals signs
content.task: Identify variables and constants in the expression: 3x + 5 = 11
